"'''Strangers Among Us: The Aliens Who Built the Galactic Empire'''" is an article by [[Abel G. Peña]], [[Rich Handley]] and [[Jonathan Wilkins]], which appeared in [[Star Wars Insider 96|''Star Wars Insider'' 96]].
